title: Living in Boulder vlog 3 - 27 - 2017: 80 kilometer diameter backgrounds

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs late at night recapping his March 27th day in Boulder. He spent the day working on organizing and building 'circle' pages for a project (likely a website), visited his mom who fed him spaghetti, and discussed an entrepreneurial idea around his cycling — charging subscribers money to get him back on the bike.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Deeply values having unstructured free time with no obligations
Not ready to rush back to riding; compares forcing it to making a plant grow too fast — wants to let it happen naturally
Considering a crowd-funding angle where subscribers pay him thresholds ($1k for rollers, $5k for outdoor riding) to incentivize — and humorously give him a reason not to — return to cycling

entities: Superderee (unclear reference, possibly a project name)

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up around 11 AM today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was working on organizing circle distances for Superderee.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I will finish building the circles tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: After building the circles, I will paint some of the different areas.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I will then work on the website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom called me to move some books from upstairs to downstairs.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My mom fed me lunch after I hadn't eaten all morning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We had spaghetti and a salad for lunch.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I told my mom I just want free time for the rest of the week.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got an entrepreneurial idea today about biking.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Subscribers have been suggesting I should start biking again.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to start biking again by April 15th.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might incentivize biking by asking for money—$1,000 to ride on rollers and $5,000 to ride outside.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I compare my approach to biking to how plants grow—you can't rush it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: After finishing the circle project, I will fix the curtains on my car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I will take photos of the car's interior and post them online.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might need to call a mechanic for documentation purposes.
